items.title: Burghausen Castle
items.summary: Visit Burghausen in southeast Bavaria, near the Austrian border, to explore the world's longest castle and enjoy a walkable town, ideal for a long weekend trip.

items.title: German-American Friendship Fest
items.summary: Celebrate partnership and 250 years of American independence at the German-American Friendship Fest, a two-day event with carnival attractions for families.

items.title: German-American Friendship Fest
items.summary: A three-day festival celebrating 75 years of German-American partnership and 250 years of U.S. independence, featuring live music, carnival rides, military displays, and fireworks.

items.title: Brezelfest (Pretzel Festival)
items.summary: Experience the biggest folk festival in the Upper Rhine region, famous for pretzels, beer, and socializing, with over 100 vendors, rides, and food booths.

items.title: Hahnenfest
items.summary: Look forward to sociable hours with live music, tasty chicken, food, drinks, a bouncy castle for kids, and bull riding for those who want to show off skills.

items.title: Ramstein Summer Night with "Cuban Affairs"
items.summary: Enjoy a themed evening with traditional Cuban music, food, and drinks, featuring the band "CUBAN AFFAIRS" playing rumba, mambo, and salsa.

items.title: Zurlaubener Mosel Festival
items.summary: Enjoy a festival right on the Mosel River with rides, culinary treats, lively music, and a colorful fireworks display on Saturday evening.

items.title: North Sea Coast & Islands
items.summary: Explore Germany's North Sea coastline, including islands like Borkum and Sylt, the Wadden Sea UNESCO site, and charming towns like Papenburg and Leer.

items.title: Freedom Fest
items.summary: Freedom Fest at Ramstein Air Base celebrated 250 years of American independence and 750 years of Kaiserslautern, featuring carnival rides, games, food, live music, and fireworks.

items.title: Dungeons and Dragons Club
items.summary: Join an after-school Dungeons and Dragons club for ages 8 and older. Registration is required due to limited space.
items.dateHint: every Thursday from 4 to 5:30 p.m., next one is July 16

items.title: Family Fundays at Baumholder Recreation Center
items.summary: Enjoy a monthly Family Funday with a hands-on craft, a family movie on the big screen, and free popcorn. Registration is required.
items.dateHint: every second Sunday from 2 to 4 p.m., next one is July 12

items.title: Legoland KMC BOSS Trip
items.summary: Join a KMC BOSS trip to Legoland Deutschland Resort. Transportation is provided, but participants must purchase their own entrance ticket.
items.dateHint: July 11, with registration open through July 10

items.title: SKIES Irish Dance Classes
items.summary: Enroll children aged 4 to 18 in summer Irish Dance Camps. All participants must be registered with Army MWR Child and Youth Services.
items.dateHint: July 13 to 16, and July 20 to 23, Monday to Thursday

items.title: SKIES Soccer Summer Camps
items.summary: Register children aged 2 to 16 for outdoor soccer training taught by professional coaches. Times and fees vary by age.

items.title: Burghausen as a base for day trips
items.summary: Use Burghausen as a central hub to visit Munich, Salzburg, Berchtesgaden, and the Austrian Alps, all within an hour's drive.

items.title: Burghausen Castle
items.summary: Explore the world's longest castle, over a kilometer long, with rich history, medieval architecture, museums, and stunning views of Austria.

items.title: Burghausen Old Town
items.summary: Wander through narrow cobblestone streets, admire Bavarian architecture, enjoy shops, restaurants, and biergartens in this charming medieval town.

items.title: Lake Wöhrsee
items.summary: Enjoy picnicking, swimming, and relaxing under shade trees at this beautiful lake located beneath Burghausen Castle, easily accessible from the old town.

items.title: Skiing near Burghausen
items.summary: Take a short drive from Burghausen to prime skiing destinations in Austria and Italy, perfect for winter sports enthusiasts.
